title: Deposition of NEDC Matrix using TM Sprayer for High Resolution MALDI Analysis of Metabolites
author: Ali Zahraei

steps.title: Remove slides from freezer (-80C) and...
steps.instruction: Remove slides from freezer (-80C) and place in a desiccator for 30 min.

steps.title: Collect autofluorescence scan using a Zeiss AxioScan Z1
steps.instruction: Collect autofluorescence scan using a Zeiss AxioScan Z1: ( https://www.protocols.io/edit/autofluorescence-microscopy-data-acquisition-b39kqr4w )

steps.title: Set nitrogen flow to 10 psi
steps.instruction: Set nitrogen flow to 10 psi. turn on TM sprayer.

steps.title: Open HTX software
steps.instruction: Open HTX software.

steps.title: Set nozzle temperature to 55 o...
steps.instruction: Set nozzle temperature to 55 o C, and heated stage temperature to 30 o C.

steps.title: Clean sample loop with 3mL of...
steps.instruction: Clean sample loop with 3mL of methanol with sprayer set to "load". Switch to "spray" and allow to spray for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Make the matrix solution at a...
steps.instruction: Make the matrix solution at a concentration of 14 mg/mL in a solution of 90% methanol. Sonicate solution for 2 min.

steps.title: Switch sprayer to "load" and load...
steps.instruction: Switch sprayer to "load" and load sample loop with 2 mL of matrix solution using a syringe.

steps.title: Switch sprayer to "spray" and allow...
steps.instruction: Switch sprayer to "spray" and allow to spray for ~1 min. Check that matrix is spraying by placing a glass slide under the nozzle.

steps.title: Tape slide onto heated stage, and...
steps.instruction: Tape slide onto heated stage, and adjust the spray area in the HTX software.

steps.title: Set the method in the HTX software:
steps.instruction: Set the method in the HTX software:

steps.title: 1350 mm/min nozzle velocity
steps.instruction: 1350 mm/min nozzle velocity
2.0 mm track spacing
0.05 mL/min flow rate

steps.title: CC pattern
steps.instruction: CC pattern

steps.title: 14 passes
steps.instruction: 14 passes

steps.title: 40 mm nozzle height
steps.instruction: 40 mm nozzle height

steps.title: 2 seconds drying time
steps.instruction: 2 seconds drying time

steps.title: Ensure that the method is highlighted
steps.instruction: Ensure that the method is highlighted. Press start under the Cycle tab. Click Continue. Wait for purge delay and confirm that the nozzle is moving.

steps.title: When matrix deposition is finished, remove...
steps.instruction: When matrix deposition is finished, remove the slides and store them in a slide box. Press "valve load confirm" in the software.

steps.title: Spray the nozzle tip with methanol...
steps.instruction: Spray the nozzle tip with methanol and acetonitrile, not touching the tip.

steps.title: Set both TM sprayer nozzle and...
steps.instruction: Set both TM sprayer nozzle and stage temperatures to 30 o C.

steps.title: With sprayer set to "load", load...
steps.instruction: With sprayer set to "load", load loop with 3 mL of methanol methanol. Set sprayer to "spray" and allow to flow for ~5 min.

steps.title: Clean the stage with Kimwipes tissue...
steps.instruction: Clean the stage with Kimwipes tissue that is sprayed with methanol.

steps.title: Shut down HTX software and close the computer
steps.instruction: Shut down HTX software and close the computer. Turn off the TM sprayer.

steps.title: Shut off the nitrogen flow
steps.instruction: Shut off the nitrogen flow.

steps.title: Dispose of syringes in biohazard container
steps.instruction: Dispose of syringes in biohazard container.
